commands: vp migrate --no-interactive # TypeScript whitespace in a Vitest type directive is valid
cat package.json # rewritten directive does not retain a redundant Vitest dependency
cat env.d.ts # directive is rewritten to the Vite+ public type surface
cat pnpm-workspace.yaml # rewritten directive does not retain shared Vitest management
vp migrate --no-interactive # directive rewriting is stable on rerun
